channel.title: flove making-of — Backend questions
channel.description: New Backend design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Shared / public replies — backend?
item.description:
• Local only (browser) for now — Keep frontend-first; everyone answers privately. Defer aggregation. • flovenet P2P aggregation — Replies sync over flovenet; native, bigger build. • oasis / SSB — Use the oasis add-on feed for shared replies.
★ decided: Local only (browser) for now · ◇ recommended: Local only (browser) for now

item.title: 'debate' target (forums)?
item.description:
• Gitea issues as debate threads — Each question debates in a Gitea issue; reuses existing infra. • A real forum (Discourse-style) — Richer discussion, a separate service to run. • Defer debate for now — Keep the copy + open placeholder until a forum exists.
★ decided: Gitea issues as debate threads · ◇ recommended: Gitea issues as debate threads

item.title: The conversation-publishing skill (piece C)?
item.description:
• Defer it — Finish talk2web + making-of first; publish whole chats later. • Build it now — A skill that publishes entire conversations like interviews. • Fold into talk2web — Make talk2web itself publish full conversations.
★ decided: Defer it · ◇ recommended: Defer it
